And that has likely only gotten worse following the pandemic. The researchers actually counted the number of words we were […]

items.title: PMs do Rio monitoraram empresário antes de matá-lo na Pavuna, aponta investigação

items.summary: Vídeos das câmeras das fardas dos policiais militares do 41ºBPM (Irajá) suspeitos de matar o empresário Daniel Patrício Santos de Oliveira, 29, na madrugada da quarta-feira (22), na Pavuna, zona norte do Rio de Janeiro, revelaram mais detalhes da dinâmica da ocorrência. O conteúdo foi veiculado pelo Fantástico, da TV Globo, neste domingo (26). Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 23h28)

items.title: Kelly Key diz que marido passará por cirurgia após AVC
items.title_zh: 凯利·基（ Kelly Key ）表示，丈夫将在中风后接受手术
items.summary:
A cantora Kelly Key, 43, afirmou neste domingo (26) que o marido, o empresário Mico Freitas, 44, passará por um procedimento cirúrgico no coração ainda nesta semana, após sofrer um acidente vascular cerebral (AVC) no início de abril.

Em publicação nas redes sociais, ela disse que os últimos dias foram de recolhimento desde o episódio, ocorrido no dia 6, em Portugal. Segundo a artista, o casal não retornou a Luanda desde então para que ele realizasse exames e identificasse a causa do problema. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 23h05)

items.title: Pré-venda de ingressos de cinema para 'Mortal Kombat 2' já está aberta

items.summary: A pré-venda de ingressos para assistir a "Mortal Kombat 2", baseado no universo do videogame criado por Ed Boon e John Tobias, já está aberta. As entradas estão disponíveis no site das redes de cinema ou na plataforma Ingresso.com. O longa chega exlcusivamente nas salas de cinema IMAX no dia 7 de maio. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Bolsonaro cumpre pena em casa com piscina e de tornozeleira; veja infográfico
items.title_zh: Bolsonaro带着泳池和脚踝手镯在家度过美好时光；请参阅信息图表
items.summary: Condenado a 27 anos e três meses de prisão por tentativa de golpe de Estado, Jair Bolsonaro (PL), 71, trocou os 64,83 m² da cela onde cumpria pena na unidade conhecida como Papudinha por uma casa de dois andares com piscina, churrasqueira e jardim no condomínio Solar de Brasília, no Jardim Botânico, área nobre da capital federal. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Que me deem alguém para odiar e invejar e serei um revolucionário obediente
items.title_zh: 给我一个讨厌和嫉妒的人，我会成为一个顺从的革命者
items.summary: Uma das máximas da psicologia do revolucionário é que quase todos os que formam a infantaria de processos políticos disruptivos são gente medíocre. As revoluções políticas se alimentam de paixões tristes, como ódio, ressentimento e inveja. Pensar o contrário é uma das principais razões para não se entender o que as revoluções políticas são e como evoluem. Dê-me alguém para odiar e invejar e serei um revolucionário obediente. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: IAs tomam lado em temas eleitorais e defendem teses contraditórias para 'bajular' usuários, diz levantamento
items.title_zh: 调查显示，人工智能在选举问题上站在一边，并向“更平坦”的用户捍卫矛盾的论点

items.title: Can domestic workers protection law end ‘modern slavery’?
items.title_zh: 家政工人保护法能否终结“现代奴隶制” ？
items.summary: As Indonesia ratifies a historic domestic worker protection law after two decades of silence, the nation must now decide if these statutory rights will remain a paper promise or finally dismantle the structures of modern slavery.

items.title: RI seeks new suppliers, export markets as tensions mount: Trade minister
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势加剧，国际扶轮寻求新的供应商和出口市场：贸易部长
items.summary: Trade Minister Budi Santoso sat down with The Jakarta Post’s Maudey Khalisha to discuss how the government is navigating challenges to maintain export performance due to the Iran war and rising protectionism.

items.title_zh: 澳大利亚部长黄在亚洲之行中提高能源安全
items.summary: Wong said in a statement that meetings with her counterparts in the three countries would "help ensure we are coordinating effectively" amid upheaval on global energy markets.

items.title: Family alleges false accusation ahead of media exec's graft trial
items.title_zh: 在媒体高管的贪污审判之前，家人指控虚假指控
items.summary: The director of Gumpalannews.com is facing a trial over alleged graft in a 2022 Simeulue regency publication project that caused losses Rp 697.5 million (US$40,428), though a local media union leader has suggested ulterior motives behind the charges.

items.title: In a fractured world order, where does the Global South fit in?
items.title_zh: 在一个四分五裂的世界秩序中，全球南方在哪里？
items.summary: The era of a Western-dominated world order is over. This is obvious, but it will take some time to sink in across the West.

items.title: Orangutan in North Sumatra uses canopy bridge in 'world first': NGO
items.title_zh: 北苏门答腊的红毛猩猩在“世界第一”中使用树冠桥：非政府组织
items.summary: A Sumatran orangutan has been filmed for the first time crossing a man-made canopy bridge constructed to help the endangered animals bypass a tarred road, an NGO said Sunday.

items.title: El Nino set to return in mid-2026: UN
items.title_zh: 厄尔尼诺现象将于2026年中期回归：联合国
items.summary: The United Nations' weather and climate agency said El Nino conditions could well develop as early as May to July.

items.title: Outdoor workers face rising health risks amid dry season
items.title_zh: 户外工作者在旱季面临不断上升的健康风险
items.summary: As the dry season is creeping in and projected to be longer and drier due to El Niño, workers who spend most of their time outside may face higher risks of heat-related disease alongside other health conditions, such as respiratory infection.

items.title: The Hormuz naval blockade and strategic implications for Indonesia
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海军封锁及其对印尼的战略影响
items.summary: As Mideast tensions reignite the threat of naval blockades, Indonesia’s control over global maritime choke points is no longer just a geographical fact; it is a strategic liability pointing to a need for Jakarta to move beyond diplomatic partnerships toward a unified, modernized maritime command.

items.title: Bakamla backs debate to levy ships in Malacca Strait
items.title_zh: 巴卡姆拉支持在马六甲海峡征收船舶的辩论
items.summary: Bakamla chief Vice Adm. Irvansyah suggested the construction of supply store and fuel station on the Indonesian side of Malacca Strait so the country could take benefits from the busy shippin line.

items.title: What is Iran’s latest proposal to US to end war? Ceasefire first, nuclear talks later
items.title_zh: 伊朗向美国提出的最新结束战争的建议是什么？先停火，后核会谈
items.summary: Iran has reportedly offered the US a new proposal focusing on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ending the war, postponing nuclear negotiations. This move aims to bypass internal divisions within Iran regarding nuclear concessions, though it could diminish US leverage in future talks.

items.title: 'Criminal decision': Rishabh Pant faces heat for Nicholas Pooran call
items.title_zh: “刑事判决” ： Rishabh Pant对Nicholas Pooran的电话感到愤怒
items.summary: Lucknow Super Giants suffered a heart-wrenching Super Over loss to Kolkata Knight Riders, with Nicholas Pooran's first-ball dismissal drawing sharp criticism from Dale Steyn. Steyn labelled the decision to send Pooran in as 'criminal' given his poor form, highlighting the missed opportunity for LSG to secure a crucial win and their subsequent slide to the bottom of the table.

items.title: 'Purchased' for Rs 1 lakh, toddler left on highway by bizman, wife for 'bringing bad luck'
items.title_zh: “购买” 10万卢比，蹒跚学步的孩子被bizman留在高速公路上，妻子因为“带来厄运”
items.summary: A Guna couple abandoned their toddler on a highway, believing she brought bad luck. Investigations revealed the child was allegedly purchased for Rs 1 lakh through an illegal network, expanding the case into a suspected child trafficking racket. The girl was found alone and is now in the care of the Child Welfare Committee.

items.title: After OpenAI and Anthropic, Jeff Bezos’s AI lab 'goes to' London
items.title_zh: 在OpenAI和Anthropic之后， Jeff Bezos的人工智能实验室“去了”伦敦
items.summary: Jeff Bezos' AI lab, Project Prometheus, is reportedly in talks to lease a significant office space in London's King's Cross. This move, following substantial funding, highlights the UK's growing appeal as a hub for AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic, which are also expanding their London footprints.

items.title: Isro plans to send civilians with STEM backgrounds to space
items.title_zh: ISRO计划将具有STEM背景的平民送入太空

items.title: Tollywood actor booked for duping NRI techie of Rs 9.35cr with marriage promise
items.title_zh: 托莱坞演员因向NRI技术人员提供9.35卢比的婚姻承诺而被预订
items.summary: A Tollywood actress and Bigg Boss contestant has been booked for allegedly defrauding a London-based software professional of Rs 9.35 crore. The victim claims the actress promised marriage and sought financial assistance for her career and personal expenses. Despite multiple attempts to finalize marriage and recover funds, the actress allegedly evaded the complainant and failed to honor repayment commitments.

items.title: Kejriwal tried to stop defections, but it was a case of too little, too late
items.title_zh: Kejriwal试图阻止叛逃，但这是一个太少，太迟的情况

items.title: After backing Trump's child savings plan, Michael Dell's next $750 m going to hospital
items.title_zh: 在支持特朗普的儿童储蓄计划后，迈克尔·戴尔的下一个$ 7.5亿去医院
items.summary: Michael and Susan Dell have donated $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This facility will integrate AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education, with construction beginning this year and opening by 2030. The donation builds on their extensive philanthropic history and commitment to Austin's growth.

items.title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ crosses Rs 1130 cr mark amid ‘Michael,’ ‘Bhooth Bangla’ buzz
items.title_zh: “Dhurandhar 2”在“Michael”中穿过1130卢比， “Bhooth Bangla”嗡嗡作响
items.summary: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its phenomenal run, crossing Rs 1130 crore in India and nearing Rs 1780 crore globally after 39 days. The film demonstrated remarkable growth over its sixth weekend, outperforming competition. Despite new releases, its enduring popularity is evident in its sustained box office success.

items.title: Child, 7, Dies, 19 Others Hospitalised After Eating Golgappa In Jharkhand
items.title_zh: 儿童， 7岁，死亡， 19岁其他人在贾坎德邦食用Golgappa后住院
items.summary: According to the civil surgeon, food poisoning was detected among the patients.

items.title: 'I'm Not A Rapist, Paedophile": Trump On Shooter Cole Allen's 'Manifesto'

items.summary: The president blamed "hate speech" by Democratic leaders for the political violence in America

items.title: Axis Bank Lays Off 3,000 Employees As Tech Investments Boost Productivity
items.title_zh: 随着技术投资提高生产力， Axis Bank裁员3000人
items.summary: Axis Bank clarified that the decline was not targeted at any specific business segment

items.summary: Sensex Today, Stock Market, Nifty, Share Market Live News Updates: Markets To Open In Green.

items.title: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Seeks Report On Petrol, Diesel Shortage
items.title_zh: 安得拉邦首席部长寻求关于汽油、柴油短缺的报告
items.summary: Officials said out of total 4,510 fuel outlets in the state, 421 petrol pumps had been shut.

items.title: Oil Jumps, Stock Futures Slip As US-Iran Talks Stall
items.title_zh: 油价上涨，股票期货下滑，美伊谈判停滞不前
items.summary: Benchmark Brent crude futures rose more than two per cent to touch a three-week high.

items.title: "Captured India's Vibrancy": PM Modi Pays Tribute To Renowned Photographer Raghu Rai
items.title_zh: “捕捉印度的活力” ： PM Modi向著名摄影师Raghu Rai致敬
items.summary: Raghu Rai's work forms a visual chronicle of modern India.

items.title: Are Minimum Wage Laws Doing More Harm Than Good To Low-Income Workers?
items.title_zh: 最低工资法对低收入工人的危害大于好处吗？
items.summary: Recent protests in Noida and Greater Noida show the issue of minimum wage is far from settled.

items.title: 【地震情報】北海道十勝南部で震度5強 津波なし
items.title_zh: 领地：北海路，南区，南区， 10分， 5分
items.summary: 27日午前5時23分ごろ、北海道の十勝地方南部で震度5強の強い揺れを観測する地震がありました。この地震による津波はありませんでした。

items.title: 岩手 大槌町の山林火災 発生6日目も延焼続く 鎮圧めど立たず
items.title_zh: 岩手大土町的森林大火在第六天继续燃烧，镇压仍在继续。
items.summary: 岩手県大槌町の山林火災は、発生から27日で6日目となりますがいまも延焼が続き、焼けたとみられる面積は27日朝の時点で1600ヘクタールあまりに拡大しています。27日からは地上部隊が山林に消火薬剤を散布するなどして引き続き消火活動にあたることにしています。

items.title: 米 夕食会発砲事件 “暗殺者名乗り 政権幹部を順に標的に”
items.summary: アメリカの首都ワシントンでトランプ大統領が参加する夕食会に押し入ろうと発砲した容疑者が拘束された事件で、容疑者は犯行を示唆するメモの中で、みずからを暗殺者と名乗った上で、政権幹部を順に標的にするとしていたと複数のメディアが伝えました。当局が動機の解明を進めています。

items.title: 株価 取引時間中の最高値更新 “イランが新提案”報道で
items.title_zh: 股票交易时间的最高价格更新“伊朗提出新提案”
items.summary: 週明けの27日の東京株式市場、日経平均株価は戦闘の終結に向けてイラン側がアメリカに対して新たな提案を示したと伝わったことから、再び6万円台をつけ、取引時間中の最高値を更新しました。

items.title: 高市首相 “補正予算案編成は現時点では必要な状況ではない”
items.title_zh: 高市首相“目前没有必要编制补充预算”
items.summary: 国会は参議院予算委員会で集中審議が行われ、立憲民主党はイラン情勢の影響をめぐり事業者から支援を求める声が強まっているとして補正予算案の編成を検討するよう求めました。高市総理大臣は今年度予算の予備費も活用できるとして現時点では編成が必要な状況ではないという認識を示しました。

items.title: 福島 喜多方の山林火災 雨降るも消火活動続く
items.title_zh: 福冈县、福冈县、福冈县
items.summary: 26日、福島県喜多方市で発生した山林火災の現場では、27日朝から雨が降っています。火の勢いは収まりつつあるということですが、消防が引き続き消火活動を行っています。

items.title: アメリカは主導権を強調 イラン外相はプーチン大統領と会談へ
items.title_zh: 美国强调领导能力，伊朗外长将与普京会谈
items.summary: アメリカとイランの戦闘終結に向けた協議の先行きが見通せない中、トランプ大統領はアメリカ側が主導権を握っていると強調しました。一方、イラン側は外交を活発化させていて、27日にはアラグチ外相がロシアを訪れてプーチン大統領と会談すると伝えられ、どのような話し合いが行われるか注目されます。

items.title: Minor party candidate for Busan mayor injured in drink attack
items.title_zh: 釜山市市长小党候选人在饮酒袭击中受伤
items.summary: The minor Reform Party's candidate running for Busan mayor was injured during street campaigning Monday after a driver in a passenger car sprayed a beverage at him in the southeastern port city. The incident occurred on a road in the city's northern ward of Geumjeong shortly after 8 a.m., when a passenger car approached candidate Jeong Yi-han as he was greeting citizens commuting to work. The driver suddenly sprayed the beverage he was drinking at Jeong's face while hurling abusive language and profanities. The candidate reportedly lost his balance and fell backward. Jeong was taken to a hospital after losing consciousness from hitting his head on the ground, while the driver fled the scene. Police said they began an investigation by analyzing witness accounts and surveillance camera footage from the scene and nearby areas. The Busan mayoral election will be held as part of the June 3 local elections.

items.title: Court set to begin ex-President Yoon's insurrection appeals trial
items.title_zh: 法院将开始审理前总统尹的叛乱上诉
items.summary: An appeals court was set to hold the first preliminary hearing of former President Yoon Suk Yeol's insurrection trial Monday over his failed 2024 martial law bid after a lower court sentenced him to life imprisonment. The Seoul High Court will convene the session at 2 p.m. following appeals from both Yoon and a special counsel team over the February ruling that convicted the ousted president on charges of leading an insurrection through his martial law declaration on Dec. 3, 2024. Special counsel Cho Eun-suk's team had demanded the death penalty for Yoon at the lower court, accusing him of declaring the decree to incite a riot with the intent of subverting the constitutional order. Yoon's short-lived martial law attempt ultimately failed after the National Assembly voted down his decree. The former president was subsequently impeached and ousted from office. Yoon, currently in custody, is not required to attend Monday's session, which will discuss the trial's future proceedings. Other defendants in the trial include former Defense Minister Kim Yong-hyun, who received a 30-year prison term

items.title: Navy, Marine Corps hold large-scale amphibious landing drills in Pohang
items.title_zh: 海军、海军陆战队在浦项举行大型两栖登陆演习
items.summary: The Navy and Marine Corps launched a weeklong regular amphibious landing exercise in a southeastern coastal city last week, the armed services said Monday, in efforts to maintain combat readiness against diversifying threats in future warfare. Some 3,200 troops were deployed for the drills set to run through Thursday in coastal areas in Pohang, about 270 kilometers southeast of Seoul, according to the Navy and the Marine Corps. On Monday, the troops held the "decisive action" phase of the exercise, which proceeded with amphibious assault drills in a coastal area with landing ships, transport aircraft and helicopters as naval warships and attack helicopters provided cover. An array of military assets was deployed for the drills, ranging from the KF-16 fighter jet and the P-8A maritime surveillance aircraft to some 20 naval vessels, including the ROKS Marado amphibious assault ship. To factor in changes in modern warfare, this year's exercise incorporated various manned and unmanned assets, including drones, and surveillance assets for coastal surveillance and ground operations, the armed

items.title: New IHO digital mapping standard effectively retires 'Sea of Japan' label, Korea says
items.title_zh: 韩国表示，新的IHO数字地图标准实际上淘汰了“日本海”标签
items.summary: A new digital mapping standard adopted by the International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) is drawing attention for what it means for Japan's long-standing push to call the body of water between the Korean Peninsula and the Japanese archipelago solely as the Sea of Japan, as the standard replaces geographical names with numerical identifiers, effectively removing the label altogether. At the fourth session of the IHO Assembly held in Monaco from April 19-23, the S-130 digital dataset standard was finalized and formally adopted. The move follows a decision made at the second Assembly in 2020 to develop S-130 as an updated framework to replace the existing standard chart, Limits of Oceans and Seas, also known as S-23. S-130 introduces a digital charting system that replaces names with numerical identifiers for maritime areas, marking a shift from a name-based framework to a number-based structure. Designed for use in electronic navigation and geographic information systems, the standard assigns each sea area a unique code based on the latitude and longitude of its central point. The syst

items.title: Our Pilgrims are fully adhering to Saudi regulations, says Envoy Enayati as first group of Iranian pilgrims lands in Madinah
items.title_zh: Enayati特使表示，我们的朝圣者完全遵守沙特的规定，是第一批抵达麦地那的伊朗朝圣者
items.summary: RIYADH — Iranian Ambassador to Saudi Arabia Alireza Enayati expressed his gratitude and appreciation to the Saudi authorities for the best care and services being extended to Hajj pilgrims from his country. “We express our thanks and appreciation to the relevant authorities in Saudi Arabia for the services they provide to ensure the comfort of our pilgrims.”Speaking to Asharq Al-Awsat, he said that every Iranian pilgrim is committed to the etiquette of Hajj and the regulations in force in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Ambassador Enayati wished the pilgrims arriving from Iran a smooth and easy Hajj in the land of the Two Holy Mosques and a safe return home after performing the rituals. “The Iranian Embassy is fully prepared to provide any assistance in this regard as well as to coordinate completely with the Saudi Ministry of Foreign Affairs,” he said.The first group of Iranian pilgrims arrived at Prince Mohammad bin Abdulaziz International Airport in Madinah on Saturday, amidst a comprehensive system of services and facilities provided by the Kingdom to all pilgrims arriving from around the world. Enayati said that the second group of Iranian pilgrims will arrive on Tuesday. “Iranian pilgrims are receiving generous care from Saudi Arabia, just as all other pilgrims do, as Iranian pilgrims had in previous years. The first group of administrative and social staff accompanying the Iranian pilgrims has arrived in the Kingdom, followed by other groups of pilgrims over the coming days,” he said.Iran will send around 30,000 pilgrims to Saudi Arabia for this year’s Hajj following coordination with Riyadh, Iranian authorities said. Akbar Rezaei, the deputy for Hajj and Umrah affairs at Iran’s Hajj and Pilgrimage Organization, said the move comes after securing the necessary official approvals.Rezaei said arrangements for the pilgrimage season were the result of agreements with Saudi Arabia’s Ministry of Hajj and Umrah, alongside contracts with specialized service providers to ensure a fully managed journey from departure to return.

items.title: Saudi FM discusses over phone regional situation with counterparts of Afghan, Qatar and Bahrain
items.title_zh: 沙特调频台与阿富汗、卡塔尔和巴林同行通过电话讨论地区局势
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan received on Sunday phone calls from foreign ministers of Afghanistan, Qatar and Bahrain. During the call, Prince Faisal and Foreign Minister of Afghanistan Amir Khan Muttaqi discussed the latest developments in the region and issues of common interest.In their phone call, Saudi foreign minister and Qatar’s Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani discussed the latest developments in the region and the efforts of both countries to establish regional security and stability.During the call, Prince Faisal and Minister of Foreign Affairs of Bahrain Abdullatif Al-Zayani discussed the current regional situation and the continuation of bilateral coordination in this regard.

items.title: Saudi, Iranian foreign ministers discuss de-escalation in phone call
items.title_zh: 沙特、伊朗外长在电话中讨论缓和紧张局势
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan received on Sunday a phone call from Iran’s Minister of Foreign Affairs Abbas Araghchi.During the call, they discussed regional developments and efforts aimed at de-escalation and easing tensions in the region.

items.title: Saudi women’s leadership roles rise to 44% in 2025 amid broad empowerment gains
items.title_zh: 在广泛赋权的情况下，沙特女性的领导角色在2025年上升至44%
items.summary: RIYADH — In a rapidly evolving development landscape, Saudi women have emerged as integral partners in driving transformation and national progress, with their representation in middle and senior management roles rising to 44% in 2025, according to the Director of the National Observatory for Women. Since the launch of Vision 2030, a qualitative shift has positioned women’s empowerment as a central pillar of development plans—representing a direct investment in human capital and a key driver of a thriving economy, vibrant society, and ambitious nation. In this context, Director of the National Observatory for Women, Dr. Sanaa Mohsen Al-Otaibi, told the Saudi Press Agency that 2025 marks a pivotal phase in the trajectory of women’s empowerment in the Kingdom. Supported by official data, progress is reflected across economic, social, and development sectors through both quantitative and qualitative indicators demonstrating tangible impact. Women’s labor market participation rose to 34.2%, while the economic participation rate of Saudi women aged 15 and above reached 36.3%, reflecting expanding integration into the workforce. In the entrepreneurship sector, women-owned establishments reached 774,123, accounting for 43.8% of total establishments—underscoring women’s growing role in the national economy. Meanwhile, unemployment among Saudi women recorded a historic decline, supported by flexible and remote work policies that expand participation opportunities. The innovation sector also saw a notable rise in Saudi women obtaining international patents in 2024 and 2025. Al-Otaibi noted that these gains align with broader progress across education, health, and quality-of-life indicators, which the Observatory analyzes to support policymaking. She added that year-on-year transformation has been driven by three key tracks: strengthening women’s economic participation; increasing representation in leadership rolesacross sectors; and expanding presence in specialized fields such as technology. She emphasized that the most significant shift is the transition of women’s empowerment from a supportive pillar to an active driver of economic growth and quality of life. Government programs—including Tamheer, Wusool, and Qurrah—have contributed to building a comprehensive ecosystem supporting training, job stability, and work-life balance. Al-Otaibi also highlighted initiatives across multiple ministries, including Human Resources and Social Development, Energy, Environment, Water and Agriculture, and Industry andMineral Resources, aimed at expanding opportunities for women across sectors. She stressed the importance of measuring progress through national tools, including the Women’s Participation in Development Index (WPD), developed with the General Authority for Statistics and based on five pillars: economic, educational, health, regulatory, and social. The Observatory is also developing qualitative indicators, most notably the Women’s Engagement in Environment and Climate Index (WEC). She added that the Kingdom has maintained a strong ranking in the World Bank’s Women, Business and the Law 2026 report, advanced in the gender gap index, and seen growing international recognition of Saudi women, including global awards in innovation, research, and sustainability. Al-Otaibi also pointed to the increasing presence of female role models across sectors, alongside efforts to document Saudi women’s contributions over more than six decades, under the patronage of Princess Moudi bint Khalid bin Abdulaziz in collaboration with Al-Nahda Society. Looking ahead, she said the next phase will focus on enhancing the quality and sustainability of women’s participation, with expanded roles in future economies—including green, purple, and digital sectors—as well as in artificial intelligence, biotechnology, and community development.

items.title: Al-Jouf Emir and Hajj Minister witness signing of deal to support Pilgrims’ City
items.title_zh: Al-Jouf Emir和朝觐部长见证签署支持朝圣者之城的协议
items.summary: SAKAKA— Emir of Al-Jouf Prince Faisal bin Nawaf received Minister of Hajj and Umrah Tawfiq Al-Rabiah at his office in Sakaka on Sunday. Deputy Emir of Al-Jouf Prince Miteb bin Mishal was also present at the meeting.The minister was accompanied by President of the General Authority of Civil Aviation Abdulaziz Al-Duailej, Governor of the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority Eng. Suhail Abanmi, and Acting Director General of Passports Maj. Gen. Saleh Al-Murabba.The Emir and the minister witnessed the signing of a cooperation memorandum between Al-Jouf's Association for Pilgrims and Umrah Services and Nusuk Foundation aimed at supporting the operational aspects of Hajj and Umrah Pilgrims City in the region and enhancing the quality of services provided to pilgrims.During the meeting, Prince Faisal reviewed the plans and work of the Ministry of Hajj and Umrah at Al-Haditha border crossing and the location through which pilgrims pass in the region under the ecosystem of services provided to enhance their quality and facilitate their journey from arrival in the Kingdom.Al-Rabiah reviewed the ministry's efforts to support the readiness of services provided to pilgrims through the crossing by enhancing coordination with relevant entities, employing technological solutions, and improving field performance efficiency. This contributes to facilitating procedures and enabling pilgrims to perform their rituals in ease and comfort.The minister also praised the leadership’s care for pilgrims and its keenness to mobilize all capabilities for their comfort. He stressed that the integration of efforts among relevant entities contributes to improving the quality of services provided and reflects the Kingdom’s commitment to serving pilgrims.

items.title: Hajj Security Forces arrest 3 Egyptians for violating Hajj regulations
items.title_zh: 朝觐安全部队逮捕3名违反朝觐规定的埃及人
items.summary: MAKKAH — Hajj Security Forces arrested an Egyptian resident for violating Hajj regulations by transporting two fellow Egyptian residents through concealed compartments inside a freight vehicle and attempting to enter Makkah and remain there without a Hajj permit. They were referred to the Public Prosecution after taking the necessary legal measures.The General Directorate of Public Security urged all the people to comply with Hajj regulations and guidelines for the Hajj of 2026 and cooperate with relevant authorities to ensure the security and safety of pilgrims. It affirmed that violators will face statutory penalties.The directorate urged the public to report about violators by calling 911 in the regions of Makkah, Riyadh, Madinah, and the Eastern Province or 999 in other regions of the Kingdom.

items.title: King Salman receives written message from president of Djibouti
items.title_zh: 萨勒曼国王收到吉布提总统的书面致辞
items.summary: RIYADH — Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques King Salman received a written message from President Ismail Omar Guelleh of Djibouti. The message is pertaining to further improving bilateral relations between the two countries.Ambassador of Djibouti to the Kingdom and Dean of the Diplomatic Corps Dya-Eddine Bamakhrama handed the message to Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs Waleed Al-Khereiji during a meeting at the ministry's headquarters in Riyadh on Sunday.During the meeting, they reviewed bilateral ties between Saudi Arabia and Djibouti. They also discussed the latest regional and international developments.

items.title: Saudi Arabia to launch program to revitalize over 500 private heritage towns and villages
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯启动计划，振兴500多个私人遗产城镇和村庄
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia is preparing to launch a national program to revitalize heritage towns, a step aimed at breathing new life into villages and historical sites and transforming them into cultural, tourist, and economic destinations. This initiative aligns with the goals of Vision 2030 and promotes the sustainability of architectural heritage, Al-Arabiya reported.Data indicates the existence of approximately 562 privately owned heritage towns and villages across Saudi Arabia. This reflects the diversity of the architectural heritage and the vast range of investment opportunities associated with it, as well as the challenges related to its protection and rehabilitation.The Heritage Commission revealed that preventive restoration interventions have been implemented at more than 160 heritage sites. These efforts aimed to protect buildings and artifacts from deterioration and environmental factors through non-invasive measures that contribute to extending their lifespan without compromising their authenticity.The relevant authorities have completed 37 integrated projects to restore and rehabilitate heritage sites in the past period. These projects included a number of prominent landmarks such as Qishla Palace, the Al-Atawla sites in the Al-Baha region, and the towns of Shaqra and Al-Shiqra, in addition to historical sites like Quba Castle, Al-Uyun Castle, and Urwa Palace.The anticipated program to revitalize heritage towns comes within the framework of a national strategy that aims to utilize these sites economically and transform them into drivers of local development, thereby enhancing cultural tourism and supporting the surrounding communities.The commission explained that more than 100 heritage towns are classified as category A or consisting of buildings of this category, which reflects their historical and architectural importance, and places them among the priorities of rehabilitation and development projects.The Heritage Commission relies on the National Register of Urban Heritage, along with ongoing field visits, to monitor the condition of sites and identify their development needs. This enhances planning efficiency and supports protection and rehabilitation decisions.The commission intends to open its programs to the public during the fourth quarter of this year, enabling owners and investors to participate in the development of heritage sites and ensure their operational and economic sustainability.This approach stems from the National Culture Strategy launched by the Kingdom in 2019, which aims to strengthen cultural identity and preserve civilizational heritage. It also aligns with the regulations that support culture and safeguard heritage, thereby enhancing the Kingdom's presence on the global cultural stage.

items.title: Madinah Emir briefed on Civil Defense readiness ahead of Hajj
items.title_zh: 麦地那埃米尔在朝觐前简要介绍了民防准备情况
items.summary: RIYADH — Emir of Madinah Prince Salman bin Sultan received Director of Civil Defense in Madinah Region Maj. Gen. Ali bin Abdullah Al-Qarni and other senior Civil Defense officials at his office in Madinah on Sunday.During the meeting, the Emir reviewed the Civil Defense Directorate's annual report, including performance indicators and efforts pertaining to safety and prevention, development initiatives, and service improvement. The meeting also covered ongoing preparations for 2026 Hajj season, including field plans and precautionary measures to ensure the safety of pilgrims.The Emir affirmed the importance of enhancing readiness and raising the level of coordination among relevant entities, particularly during the Hajj season, to strengthen the protection of lives and property and contribute to providing the best services for the pilgrims.

items.title: NCM forecasts heavy rains to spread across Kingdom through week
items.title_zh: NCM预测一周内暴雨将蔓延到整个王国
items.summary: RIYADH — The National Center for Meteorology (NCM) forecasts continued rainfall of varying intensity across most regions of Saudi Arabia until Saturday. The forecast is based on outputs from the Saudi numerical weather model, with the NCM releasing an animated map illustrating the expected movement and intensity of the rain. The NCM has warned that rainfall could be accompanied by high-speed winds reaching 60 km/h, hail, high waves in coastal areas and flash floods. Starting Sunday evening, rainfall is expected to affect Makkah, Asir, Al-Baha, Madinah, Qassim, and the Northern Borders regions, with the heaviest downpours forecast over Taif in Makkah, areas surrounding Hafr Al-Batin in the Eastern Province, and the areas between Madinah and Qassim, according to the map. Rainfall is expected to ease later in the evening and into Monday afternoon. By then, heavy rain will return to much of central Makkah, with scattered showers north of Asir and south of Jazan. Later in the afternoon, moderate to heavy rain will spread across the southwestern regions, affecting Jazan, Asir, and Makkah. Early evening Monday, rainfall intensity will weaken, with the system shifting toward Riyadh and scattered showers reaching the northern parts of the Eastern Province. By Tuesday morning, rainfall will have largely dissipated across the Kingdom, except for light showers in western parts of Riyadh. Later in the morning, these light showers are expected to move toward the capital and surrounding areas before clearing by the afternoon. Tuesday evening, light to moderate rain will redevelop across southern regions, including Najran, Asir, and Makkah, with scattered showers in the northern parts of the Eastern Province. Light rain will continue across several regions until Wednesday evening, when rainfall is expected to intensify over Asir, Najran, and Jazan. Rainfall will then ease, with light showers moving across northern regions between Tabuk, Al-Jouf, and the Northern Borders through Thursday morning. Scattered rain is also expected in northern parts of the Eastern Province. By Thursday evening, moderate to heavy rain will return to central Asir and areas between Najran and Jazan. Conditions will remain mostly dry until Friday afternoon, when moderate to heavy rainfall is forecast to redevelop across southwestern regions, including Jazan, Asir, and Makkah. By early evening, rainfall will continue in these regions while extending into Madinah and Qassim. Later in the evening, intensity will decrease, with showers shifting eastward toward Riyadh and Qassim, affecting northern parts of Riyadh and southern Qassim. Early Saturday morning, rainfall will weaken and largely clear across the Kingdom before returning as light showers over Riyadh, Makkah, and the Eastern Province. By Saturday afternoon, moderate to heavy rain will redevelop over Jazan, Asir, and Makkah before easing and shifting eastward toward Riyadh and the Eastern Province.
